page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with 1 thread per core, utilizing an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it is equipped with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers of modern cloud compute resources. Single-core and multi-core CPU performance tests via stress-ng rank in the bottom 25%, while Passmark CPU and memory scores also fall into the weak category. Memory bandwidth tests show a significant drop-off from cached small-block reads to uncached large-block reads, which rank in the bottom 10%. Data processing benchmarks, including gzip compression and bzip3 decompression, consistently register in the weak to poor categories.

Given its older Intel Xeon hardware generation and modest benchmark results, the ecs.sn2ne.xlarge offers an entry-level general-purpose profile. It is best suited for workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation but do not demand high-performance computing or high-throughput memory operations. Suitable use cases include basic web serving, development and testing environments, small-scale database operations, and legacy applications that benefit from a stable, dedicated resource allocation without the premium cost of newer hardware generations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the KVM hypervisor. It utilizes the x86_64 architecture and provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark evaluations place its CPU and memory performance in the lower tiers, with stress-ng, Passmark, and memory bandwidth tests consistently ranking in the bottom 10% to 25%. Consequently, this instance is best suited for workloads with modest computational demands, such as development environments, basic web serving, and small-scale database operations that require dedicated CPU resources without the need for high-performance throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, suitable for entry-level workloads.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose virtual machine with balanced memory-to-CPU allocation for entry-level workloads and development environments.

16.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
